title: limonium depauperatum
intro: Limonium depauperatum, also known as Sea Lavender or Dwarf Sea Lavender, is a low-growing, perennial shrub native to the coastal regions of the Mediterranean. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Limonium depauperatum include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting respiratory health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a variety of health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
